title: apparatus-annotator
description: JEAB Apparatus category. Declares physical apparatus used in the experiment: chambers, operanda, hardware interfaces.

operandum.description: Response device declaration (program-level) and functional assignment (schedule-level). At program level, declares the physical existence and specifications of an operandum (JEAB Apparatus convention: 'Two retractable levers (ENV-112CM) were mounted on the front wall'). At schedule level, references a previously declared operandum by name and assigns it to a schedule component (JEAB Procedure convention: 'Responses on the left lever were reinforced on a VI 30-s schedule').

positional.description: Device identity (e.g. 'left_lever', 'center_key'). At schedule level, must match a name declared at program level.

model.description: Manufacturer model identifier (e.g. 'ENV-112CM'). Program level only.

force.description: Minimum operating force (e.g. '0.25N'). Program level only.

component.description: Component index for compound schedules. Schedule level only.

scope_semantics.program: Apparatus declaration — introduces a physical device with optional specifications. No behavioral verbs.
scope_semantics.schedule: Procedure reference — assigns a declared device to a schedule component. No physical specifications.

hardware.description: Physical hardware backend. Presence implies physical apparatus. Omission means virtual/simulation mode.
